name: a5c-ai-agent-mux
description: unified TypeScript SDK and CLI (`amux`) for driving heterogeneous coding-agent harnesses — Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Copilot, Cursor, OpenCode, pi, omp, openclaw, hermes — through one contract.
